testing,

Blind benchmark test for deepseek-v4-flash.
Questions are generated fresh so the model hasn't seen them.
Answers are stored separately and only compared after answering.
Cheat test: compare my answers to the now-revealed answer key.

Test harness for tools-mcp-server.py
Validates the MCP stdio protocol and all 6 tool categories.
Sends initialize, tools/list, and tools/call requests, then saves results.

Integration tests for sensory-module.py
Run: python test-sensory-module.py

MCP Server: CortexStratum Toolchain
Exposes xTrace, DTrace, Skill Router, Output Condenser, Goal Registry,
and Commitment Checker as MCP tools for use by OpenCode and benchmark runners.

Protocol: JS

verifier-middleware.py — Parallel verifier for CortexStratum MCP pipeline.

Cross-checks every tool call for security violations, oversight anomalies,
state drift, and generates renudge correction si

mcp_tools.name: xtrace_log_error
mcp_tools.description: Log an error occurrence with signature for xTrace error tracking

mcp_tools.name: xtrace_search
mcp_tools.description: Search xTrace error registry for a known error signature

mcp_tools.name: xtrace_status
mcp_tools.description: Get xTrace error tracking summary statistics

mcp_tools.name: dtrace_add
mcp_tools.description: Log an architectural decision to DTrace

mcp_tools.name: dtrace_search
mcp_tools.description: Search DTrace decision registry

mcp_tools.name: skill_router_match
mcp_tools.description: Match a task description to relevant skills using the Skill Router

mcp_tools.name: output_condenser
mcp_tools.description: Condense command output to essential information

mcp_tools.name: goal_registry_init
mcp_tools.description: Initialize a new goal in the Goal Registry

mcp_tools.name: goal_registry_add_subgoal
mcp_tools.description: Add a sub-goal to the current goal stack

mcp_tools.name: goal_registry_status
mcp_tools.description: Get current goal registry status

mcp_tools.name: goal_registry_check_alignment
mcp_tools.description: Check if current action aligns with the original goal

mcp_tools.name: commitment_checker_list
mcp_tools.description: List pending commitments for this session

mcp_tools.name: commitment_checker_verify
mcp_tools.description: Mark a commitment as verified for this session

mcp_tools.name: art_generate_svg
mcp_tools.description: Generate SVG diagrams, flowcharts, and illustrations from a text description

mcp_tools.name: art_generate_theme
mcp_tools.description: Generate a color theme with roles and WCAG contrast validation from a description

mcp_tools.name: art_extract_palette
mcp_tools.description: Extract complementary, analogous, and triadic palettes from a base hex color

mcp_tools.name: art_design_concept
mcp_tools.description: Generate a design concept with layout, typography, and spacing guidelines from requirements

mcp_tools.name: lit_analyze_text
mcp_tools.description: Analyze text for reading level (Flesch-Kincaid), key concepts, argument structure, and sentiment

mcp_tools.name: lit_extract_concepts
mcp_tools.description: Extract key concepts, their definitions, context, and relationships from text

mcp_tools.name: lit_generate_study_guide
mcp_tools.description: Generate a study guide from content with key terms, discussion questions, and section summaries

mcp_tools.name: lit_analyze_philosophy
mcp_tools.description: Analyze philosophical arguments: premises, conclusions, reasoning type, detected philosophers, and schools

mcp_tools.name: sensory_browse
mcp_tools.description: Navigate to a URL using Playwright (headless Firefox) and extract content. Modes: text, html, markdown, links, metadata

mcp_tools.name: sensory_screenshot
mcp_tools.description: Take a screenshot of a web page via Playwright

mcp_tools.name: sensory_interact
mcp_tools.description: Navigate to URL and perform actions (click, type, press, wait)

mcp_tools.name: sensory_extract_pdf
mcp_tools.description: Extract text from a PDF file

mcp_tools.name: sensory_extract_html
mcp_tools.description: Extract text from raw HTML content. Modes: clean (trafilatura), soup (BeautifulSoup), tables

mcp_tools.name: sensory_extract_image
mcp_tools.description: Extract text from an image via OCR (if pytesseract installed) or return image metadata

mcp_tools.name: sensory_scrape
mcp_tools.description: Fetch a URL via HTTP (no JS) and extract content. Modes: text, html, links, tables, json

mcp_tools.name: sensory_extract_article
mcp_tools.description: Extract clean article content from a URL using trafilatura

mcp_tools.name: sensory_api_request
mcp_tools.description: Make an HTTP API request (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH) with structured response

mcp_tools.name: sensory_fetch_rss
mcp_tools.description: Parse an RSS/Atom feed and return structured items

mcp_tools.name: sensory_read_file
mcp_tools.description: Read a local text file and return its content

mcp_tools.name: sensory_search
mcp_tools.description: Web search via DuckDuckGo (no API key needed). Returns title, URL, snippet.

mcp_tools.name: audio_analyze_file
mcp_tools.description: Analyze WAV audio file: duration, channels, sample rate, amplitude stats

mcp_tools.name: audio_waveform
mcp_tools.description: Generate ASCII waveform visualization from audio file

mcp_tools.name: audio_frequency_analysis
mcp_tools.description: DFT-based frequency analysis: band energy, dominant frequency, spectral centroid

mcp_tools.name: audio_music_theory
mcp_tools.description: Music theory analysis: chord detection, scale matching, intervals from notes or frequencies

mcp_tools.name: audio_speech_analysis
mcp_tools.description: Speech transcript analysis: WPM, filler words, pace rating, readability

mcp_tools.name: audio_convert_guide
mcp_tools.description: Audio format conversion guide with ffmpeg commands and quality comparison

mcp_tools.name: audio_generate_tone
mcp_tools.description: Generate sine/square/saw/triangle wave tone as base64 WAV

mcp_tools.name: coder_analyze_code
mcp_tools.description: Analyze code for quality, complexity, smells, and security issues across 12 languages

mcp_tools.name: coder_generate_framework
mcp_tools.description: Generate complete project scaffold (web-api, cli-tool, library, desktop, microservice, data-pipeline, fullstack) for 12 languages

mcp_tools.name: coder_debug
mcp_tools.description: Analyze error messages and stack traces, suggest fixes (50+ error patterns across languages)

mcp_tools.name: coder_review
mcp_tools.description: Code review with severity ratings (security, performance, readability, architecture, testing)

mcp_tools.name: coder_explain
mcp_tools.description: Educational code explanation at beginner/intermediate/advanced level

mcp_tools.name: coder_convert
mcp_tools.description: Convert code between languages (Python↔JS, Python→Go, Python→Rust, JS↔TS)

mcp_tools.name: coder_architecture
mcp_tools.description: Architecture pattern recommendation (MVC, Hexagonal, CQRS, Event-Driven, Microservices, etc.)

mcp_tools.name: devops_container_debug
mcp_tools.description: Diagnose container issues (Podman/Docker) from error logs

mcp_tools.name: devops_permissions_analyze
mcp_tools.description: Analyze permission/usernamespace issues in container environments

mcp_tools.name: devops_compose_generator
mcp_tools.description: Generate Docker/Podman Compose files from service definitions

mcp_tools.name: devops_samba_config
mcp_tools.description: Generate Samba/SMB share configurations with OS-specific troubleshooting

mcp_tools.name: devops_mergerfs_setup
mcp_tools.description: Configure mergerfs for drive pooling with policy explanations and optimization tips

mcp_tools.name: devops_dockerfile_analyze
mcp_tools.description: Analyze and optimize Dockerfiles for security, caching, and size

mcp_tools.name: devops_network_troubleshoot
mcp_tools.description: Diagnose container networking issues (DNS, ports, bridges, host networking)

mcp_tools.name: gamedev_design_analyze
mcp_tools.description: Analyze game concept: fun factor, engagement loops, monetization fit, market position

mcp_tools.name: gamedev_scaffold_project
mcp_tools.description: Generate Unity/Unreal/Roblox project scaffold with real working boilerplate files

mcp_tools.name: gamedev_mechanics_guide
mcp_tools.description: Game mechanics design guide: core loops, progression systems, reward schedules by genre

mcp_tools.name: gamedev_monetization
mcp_tools.description: Monetization strategy recommendations with revenue estimates and ethical guidance

mcp_tools.name: gamedev_optimization
mcp_tools.description: Engine-specific optimization advice (FPS, draw calls, memory, load times, network)

mcp_tools.name: gamedev_compare_engines
mcp_tools.description: Compare game engines (Unity/Unreal/Godot/Roblox) for specific project types

mcp_tools.name: gamedev_level_design
mcp_tools.description: Level design principles, flow diagrams, pacing guides, and playtesting checklists

mcp_tools.name: memory_search
mcp_tools.description: Local BM25 memory search with synonym expansion and fuzzy matching — zero LLM cost

mcp_tools.name: memory_synthesize
mcp_tools.description: Search and synthesize memory results into a narrative with inline citations

mcp_tools.name: memory_add
mcp_tools.description: Add a memory entry for future BM25 search and synthesis

mcp_tools.name: memory_consolidate
mcp_tools.description: Merge duplicate/similar memory entries by Jaccard similarity threshold

mcp_tools.name: memory_status
mcp_tools.description: Get NE-Memory engine status: entry count, storage size, unique terms, last timestamp

mcp_tools.name: verifier_status
mcp_tools.description: Get verifier middleware status: checks run, violations found, renudges sent, uptime

mcp_tools.name: verifier_renudge
mcp_tools.description: Send a correction signal (renudge) to steer the agent back on track
